---
title: "Guozheng Huang"
#subtitle: "Residualsun"
image: "img/avatar.jpg"
image-alt: "Residualsun"
back-to-top-navigation: false

listing: 
- id: posts
  contents: "../posts/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  #grid-columns: 3 #这个是规定行数的。
  #max-items: 3 #这个是设置展示多少帖子出来的。
  page-size: 3
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, date, image]
  #image-height: "200"
#- id: daily
#  contents: 
#    - "../daily/*/**/index.qmd"
#  sort: date desc
#  type: grid
#  grid-columns: 1
#  categories: false
#  sort-ui: false
#  filter-ui: false
#  fields: [title, image]
#  max-items: 1
#  image-height: "200"
#- id: reading
#  contents: 
#    - "../reading/*/**/index.qmd"
#  sort: date desc
#  type: grid
#  grid-columns: 1
#  categories: false
#  sort-ui: false
#  filter-ui: false
#  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
#  max-items: 1
#  image-height: "200"

about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  id: hero-heading
page-layout: full
toc: false
sidebar: false

execute: 
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
  
comments: false
---

## About me

Hello, I am Guozheng Huang, an ordinary Chinese junior student who likes to listen to Jay Chou and *my little airport* when I am idle, *Linkin Park* when I am depressed, and *Leslie Cheung* when I am nostalgic.

I am learning English writing and committed to being a long-termist.

This my favorite sentences in Chinese.

> 人生如树花同发，随风而散：或拂帘幌，坠茵席之上，或关篱墙，落粪溷之中。

<!--
::: {.panel-tabset align="left"}
## Interests

-   Writing
-   Reading
-   Talking

## Education

-   **B.S.** \| Sociology \| [2021 - 2025]{#date style="color:darkgrey;"}

-->

<!--
## Experience

-   **Postdoctoral Fellow**

    The Chinese University of Hong Kong

    [Dec 2022 - June 2023]{style="color:darkgrey;"}

-   **Associate Researcher**

    Stanford Research Institute (SRI)

    [June 2021 - Jan 2022]{style="color:darkgrey;"}
    
:::
-->

## Recent posts

::: {#posts}
:::

<a href="../posts/index.html"><button type="button" class="btn btn-primary float-end btn-sm">See all</button></a>

<!--

## Lately……

::: grid

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Posts

::: {#posts}
:::

[All →](../posts){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Daily

::: {#daily}
:::

[All →](../daily){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Reading

::: {#reading}
:::

[All →](../reading){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

:::
end grid -->
